events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: George Michael would have been 63 today, a legendary singer, songwriter and record producer.

angles.name: Remembering George Michael
angles.copy: George Michael would have been 63 today, a legendary singer, songwriter and record producer, best known for his work with Wham! and as a solo artist.

events.title: Anniversary of Michael Jackson's Death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of Michael Jackson's death, the King of Pop who left an indelible mark on the music industry.

angles.name: Michael Jackson's Legacy
angles.copy: Today we remember the King of Pop, Michael Jackson, who left an indelible mark on the music industry with his iconic songs and dance moves.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Ringo Starr turns 86 today, the legendary drummer for the Beatles.

angles.name: Ringo Starr's Birthday
angles.copy: Ringo Starr turns 86 today, the legendary drummer for the Beatles, with a career spanning over six decades.

angles.name: Brian May's Birthday
angles.copy: Brian May turns 74 today, the legendary guitarist and songwriter for Queen, known for his iconic riffs and solos.

angles.name: Mick Jagger's Birthday
angles.copy: Mick Jagger turns 83 today, the legendary frontman for the Rolling Stones, with a career spanning over five decades.

events.title: MTV Launched 47 Years Ago
events.blurb: MTV launched 47 years ago, revolutionizing the music industry with its 24-hour music video format.

angles.name: MTV's Launch
angles.copy: MTV launched 47 years ago, revolutionizing the music industry with its 24-hour music video format, starting with the Buggles' 'Video Killed the Radio Star'.

events.title: Oasis Released Definately Maybe 32 Years Ago
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album Definately Maybe 32 years ago, marking the beginning of the Britpop era.

angles.name: Oasis' Debut Album
angles.copy: Oasis released their debut album Definately Maybe 32 years ago, marking the beginning of the Britpop era and changing the music landscape.

events.title: Woodstock Festival Took Place 57 Years Ago
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago, a pivotal moment in music history that brought together legendary artists and defined a generation.

angles.name: Woodstock's Legacy
angles.copy: The iconic Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago, a pivotal moment in music history that brought together legendary artists and defined a generation.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis' Death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of Elvis' death, the King of Rock and Roll who left an indelible mark on the music industry.

angles.name: Elvis' Legacy
angles.copy: Today we remember the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis, who left an indelible mark on the music industry with his iconic songs and dance moves.

events.title: Tupac Shakur Shot 30 Years Ago
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur was shot 30 years ago, a tragic event that shocked the music world and left a lasting impact on hip-hop.

angles.name: Tupac Shakur's Legacy
angles.copy: Tupac Shakur was shot 30 years ago, a tragic event that shocked the music world and left a lasting impact on hip-hop, with his music and message continuing to inspire generations.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix' Death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of Jimi Hendrix' death, the legendary guitarist and songwriter who left an indelible mark on rock music.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix' Legacy
angles.copy: Today we remember Jimi Hendrix, the legendary guitarist and songwriter who left an indelible mark on rock music with his innovative and iconic playing style.

events.title: Beatles Released Abbey Road 57 Years Ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album Abbey Road 57 years ago, a groundbreaking record that continues to influence music to this day.

angles.name: Abbey Road's Legacy
angles.copy: The Beatles released their iconic album Abbey Road 57 years ago, a groundbreaking record that continues to influence music to this day with its innovative production and timeless songs.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde turns 75 today, the legendary singer and songwriter for the Pretenders.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde's Birthday
angles.copy: Chrissie Hynde turns 75 today, the legendary singer and songwriter for the Pretenders, known for her powerful voice and enduring songs.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher's Birthday
angles.copy: Liam Gallagher turns 54 today, the iconic frontman for Oasis and solo artist, known for his powerful voice and unapologetic style.

events.title: Apple Released the First iPod 25 Years Ago
events.blurb: Apple released the first iPod 25 years ago, revolutionizing the way we listen to music and changing the music industry forever.

angles.name: iPod's Impact
angles.copy: Apple released the first iPod 25 years ago, revolutionizing the way we listen to music and changing the music industry forever with its innovative design and user-friendly interface.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, a celebration of the iconic spy and his enduring legacy in film and popular culture.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Today is James Bond Day, a celebration of the iconic spy and his enduring legacy in film and popular culture, with his suave style and thrilling adventures continuing to captivate audiences worldwide.
